name: Diversified Energy Co
business: Diversified Energy Company produces, transports, and markets natural gas, NGLs, and oil from mature, long-life assets primarily in the Appalachian and Central regions of the United States. The company focuses on optimizing and extending the productive life of existing wells through advanced monitoring and data analytics. It sells its production on month-to-month contracts at prevailing market prices and no single customer exceeds 10% of total revenues.
sellsTo: Natural gas, NGLs, and oil purchasers in the open market

exposures.sentence: We are engaged in the production, transportation, and marketing of natural gas, NGLs, and oil, managing a diversified portfolio of mature, long-life assets.

catalysts.event: Launch of well plugging fund with West Virginia
catalysts.sentence: In October 2025, we launched a well plugging fund with the state of West Virginia dedicated to retiring oil and gas wells. Over the initial 20 year period of the agreement, we plan to invest $70 million
